<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — servlet-mapping

App at / with Vaadin servlet bound to /ui/*, proxied over AJP. /HILLA push uses an HTTP/WebSocket proxy; /ui/HILLA/* and /ui/connect/* are rewritten back to /HILLA/* and /connect/* on the backend (Hilla resources live at the context root). Root-level static resources flow through the AJP catch-all.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
RewriteEngine on
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Upgrade}    websocket [NC]
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Connection} upgrade [NC]
# AJP cannot carry WebSocket frames; PUSH is proxied to Vaadin's HTTP port.
# Hilla push collapses /ui/HILLA back to /HILLA; in-mapping WS paths
# (/ui/VAADIN/push) keep the /ui prefix.
RewriteRule ^/(ui/(HILLA)|(ui))/(.*) "ws://vaadin:8080/$2$3/$4" [P,L]

# Hilla browser-callables (/connect/*) live at backend root, not under /ui.
ProxyPass           /ui/HILLA/      ajp://vaadin:8009/HILLA/
ProxyPass           /ui/connect/    ajp://vaadin:8009/connect/
ProxyPass           /               ajp://vaadin:8009/
```
